checks.evidence: Phase 08R adds import/runtime packaging for transcription_mrna_export without moving translation into the nucleus.
Visible assembly target is Workspace.Nucleus_Model/GeneDynamics, not a replacement Nucleus_Model.
Export package includes MRNA_ExportPath_ToPore and PoreExport_CheckpointState, and the runtime controller maps export_mrna to those cues.
No runtime binding exports ActiveGene_Locus or chromatin out of the nucleus.
Open Cloud package asset IDs are required before Studio assembly can be validated.

decision: Whole-cell contract is ready for Phase 08R import, but current project status must remain upload blocked until real Roblox asset IDs exist.
